sales.description:
KYRENAICA. Kyrene. AV 1/10 Stater (Obol) (0.73 gms), ca. 305-300 B.C. NGC AU, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
SNG Cop-1233; BMC-216-220. Obverse: Head of Ammon right; Reverse: Thunderbolt; stars flanking. An impressively detailed specimen, offering a bold strike, and nice lustrous brilliance, and escaping most of the faults that often plague the type. The noted brushing is unobtrusive and hard to spot.

From the Peter Jone...

Ancients
CILICIA. Mallus. Ca. 385-333 BC. AR obol (9mm, 4h). NGC Choice XF. MAΛP (?), bearded head of Herakles left, wearing lion skin headdress / MA, swan standing left on kernel, head reverted. SNG Von Aulock 5720. Cf. Numismatica Ars Classica, Auction 82 (20 May 2015), lot 211. Note: Von Aulock's obverse die appears to have a legend, but said legend is not described.   www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
